meaning: n.价值,估价,评价,价格,[数]值,确切涵义vt.估价,评价,重视
examples: I don't own anything of any value.
The show was good entertainment value.
Sentiment remains grumpy and cautious, and as a value-oriented investor I am thankful for this, too.
It sells for 11 times my estimate of 2011 earnings and two times book value.
